name: recoup-engineering
description: Engineering workflows for AI agents — write and maintain high-signal GitHub tracking issues, deliver them docs-first and test-driven end-to-end, and benchmark any plugin or skills folder against the frontier of skill design.

interface.shortDescription: Write and ship GitHub tracking issues, and benchmark skill packs against the frontier
interface.longDescription: Engineering workflow skills for AI agents. Write and maintain high-signal GitHub tracking issues in the Recoupable house style, deliver them docs-first and test-driven from open to shipped with preview verification, and benchmark any plugin or skills folder against the frontier of skill/plugin design.
